initial_observation: Abnormal vibration on bearing B2, noise audible from 10m
root_cause: Metal particle ingress in lubrication circuit from upstream mill scale buildup
contributing_factors: Oil filter not replaced at last service
Increased mill scale generation due to raw material change
action_taken: Flushed lubrication circuit, replaced oil filter, replaced bearing SKF-22318, cleaned upstream scale traps
outcome: Resolved. Equipment returned to normal operation.
recurrence_prevention: Increased oil filter inspection to weekly. Added metal particle sensor to lube circuit.

initial_observation: High vibration and elevated current draw on BF Blower #1
root_cause: Impeller imbalance due to material buildup on blades
contributing_factors: High dust content in blast furnace gas
action_taken: Stopped blower, cleaned impeller blades, performed dynamic balancing, restarted
outcome: Resolved. Vibration returned to 1.4 mm/s after balancing.
recurrence_prevention: Added impeller cleaning to monthly PM schedule.

initial_observation: Vibration spike on RM#3 bearing B2 post-maintenance
root_cause: Improper bearing installation during last maintenance — insufficient preload
action_taken: Dismantled bearing assembly, reinstalled with correct preload using calibrated tools, ran test at 30% speed for 2 hours
outcome: Resolved. Vibration at 2.1 mm/s after correct installation.
recurrence_prevention: Mandatory torque wrench calibration check before bearing installation.

initial_observation: Critical vibration on RM#3. Warning ignored for 6 days. Catastrophic bearing failure.
root_cause: Complete bearing race failure due to delayed intervention after initial warning signs
action_taken: Emergency shutdown. Full bearing assembly replacement. Shaft inspection. Coupling alignment.
outcome: Resolved after 22 hours. Significant production loss.
recurrence_prevention: This incident led to implementing the AI-based anomaly detection system.

initial_observation: High temperature and vibration on Compressor A outlet stage
root_cause: Fouled intercooler — reduced heat rejection caused thermal runaway in compression stage
action_taken: Shutdown, cleaned intercooler tubes with high-pressure water jet, replaced inlet filter
outcome: Resolved. Temperature returned to 79°C after cleaning.
recurrence_prevention: Intercooler cleaning added to quarterly PM. Temperature alarm threshold reduced to 95°C.

initial_observation: Coupling misalignment detected during routine inspection
root_cause: Thermal expansion caused shaft misalignment, coupling worn beyond service limits
contributing_factors: Coupling insert not replaced at scheduled interval
action_taken: Laser alignment performed, replaced coupling insert CI-44, tightened foundation bolts
recurrence_prevention: Foundation bolts added to monthly inspection checklist.

initial_observation: Motor insulation resistance drop detected during megger test
root_cause: Moisture ingress in motor windings due to damaged cable gland seal
contributing_factors: Cable gland not inspected during last PM
action_taken: Motor removed, windings baked at 80°C for 12 hours, replaced cable gland seals, reinstalled
outcome: Resolved. Insulation resistance restored to 250 MΩ.
recurrence_prevention: Added moisture sensors in motor terminal box.

initial_observation: Pressure fluctuations and abnormal valve noise
root_cause: Suction valve seat wear causing leakage and pressure loss
contributing_factors: Valve not replaced at recommended 12,000 hour interval
action_taken: Replaced suction valve assembly, cleaned intake filter, pressure tested system
recurrence_prevention: Valve replacement interval reduced to 10,000 hours.

initial_observation: Shaft seal leakage, lubricant contamination with water detected
root_cause: Shaft seal SS-12 degraded due to high temperature cycling
contributing_factors: Cooling water leak near bearing housing
action_taken: Replaced shaft seal, repaired cooling water pipe leak, flushed lubrication system
outcome: Resolved. No leakage, oil analysis clean.
recurrence_prevention: Seal replacement interval set to 2.5 years.

initial_observation: Belt drive slippage, reduced air flow output
root_cause: V-belt tension loss due to belt stretch over time
contributing_factors: Belt tension not checked in last 6 months
action_taken: Adjusted belt tension, replaced worn pulley, realigned drive system
outcome: Resolved. Air flow restored to 85 m³/min.
recurrence_prevention: Belt tension check added to monthly PM.
